items.html: Thus it has been explained: one door, one hinge, and one MaNTzePaCh, whose discernment is one Kli [vessel] together with the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] in it. And all this was drawn to her at first — that is, when her Partzuf was being corrected, and the discernments of the Mochin in her were drawn into her, and the five Gevurot were drawn into her. And all this was drawn to her by means of ZA [Zeir Anpin] himself, at the back of his chest, as said above in the fourth discernment.
